history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A digital painting of a woman with pale skin, dark hair, and red lipstick, wearing a dark hooded cloak. The cloak has intricate silver or grey embroidery around the hood and on the sleeve cuffs. Her eyes are large and white with dark irises, and her expression is intense and mysterious. She is shown from the chest up, with her right arm bent and her fist clenched near her face. The lighting is dramatic, with strong shadows and highlights, particularly on her face and clothing, creating a dark and moody atmosphere. Reddish light illuminates the edges of her hood and casts a faint glow on her skin. The style is realistic with a hint of fantasy or gothic aesthetic. The background is dark and out of focus, emphasizing the subject.
